## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO wins and plan the 2026 roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Redirects Complete, Traffic Rebounding:** The major redirect project is finished. Traffic to new ketamine state pages is rebounding immediately, confirming Google is finding the new URLs and no penalty was incurred.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [**New Editorial Strategy is a Success:** The "treatment-led" editorial strategy is driving compounding growth in high-quality organic sessions and significantly increasing Innerwell's visibility in LLM search results.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**2026 Roadmap Priorities:** Psychiatry is the next service priority. GrowthX will analyze the ROI of city-level pages vs. state-level pages and explore a new "Insurance" content hub to capture high-LTV patients.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Holiday Content Pipeline:** 16 articles are staged for review to ensure continuous publishing through the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO & Site Structure

  - [**Redirect Project Complete:** The major redirect project is finished, successfully fixing all batches and establishing a clear site structure for ketamine and mental health services.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Traffic Rebound Confirmed:** A Looker view shows traffic immediately returning to new ketamine state pages, validating the redirect work and confirming Google is finding the new URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [**Remaining Technical Tasks:**](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [**Footer Cleanup:** Blocked by a hiccup with the SEO index page; Ilya will fix it next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [**Navigation Bar:** The "Search by location" feature incorrectly defaults to the mental health page. Matt will sync with Jacob on a fix.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### Editorial Strategy & Performance

  - [**Strategy Pivot:** The editorial strategy pivoted from condition-based to "treatment-led" content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Ketamine Cluster Success:** The initial experiment with 25 articles in the ketamine cluster is performing exceptionally well.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
      - [**Organic Sessions:** Showing compounding, week-on-week growth.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Engaged Sessions:** Scaling alongside total sessions, confirming high content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:** The strategy is also driving significant growth in LLM referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [**Scrunch Tool:** Shows Innerwell is being cited more often in LLM responses for relevant prompts (e.g., "ketamine treatment for depression").](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

### 2026 Roadmap & Priorities

  - [**Service Expansion:**](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - **\#1 Priority:** Psychiatry (a small go-to-market test is planned).
      - **\#2 Priority:** EMDR.
  - [**City vs. State Pages:** GrowthX will analyze the ROI of building more city-level pages vs. focusing on state-level pages, which may offer a better return.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**New "Insurance" Content Hub:**](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Insurance is a key business driver, attracting high-LTV patients.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Create a top-level "Insurance" navigation item leading to pages for specific providers (e.g., "Innerwell & Blue Cross Blue Shield"). These pages could list accepted clinicians, creating a scalable content structure.](https://fathom.video/share/9E4PqVozW-s3yZggrPeQa_ZoLwAXhcZ8?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
